source_pr.title: planner: complete delete support for local temporary table
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #26049

complete delete support for local temporary table

### What is changed and how it works?

Modify `getLatestIndexInfo` in `planbuilder.go` to make this function get the right schema for temporary table.

Also added some tests. 

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test

Side effects

- N/A


### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release note
